Meta.title: VocalLeague — Global AI Vocal Performance League
Meta.description: Discover who sings a song best. AI-scored, community-voted vocal performances.

Nav.footerTagline: VocalLeague — embeds only, never hosts media.

Common.provisionalBadgeTitle: Estimated by AI from metadata — not a real audio measurement.

Home.heroSubtitle: Add a YouTube performance, get a Provisional AI Estimate, then let verified listeners vote and battle.
